channel.title: Laureesh Blog
channel.description: Project notes, tutorials, and student software development write-ups from Laureesh.

item.title: Getting Started with React & TypeScript
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to setting up a React project with TypeScript, Vite, and modern tooling for a professional development workflow.

item.title: Why I Chose Firebase for My Portfolio
item.description: Exploring the pros and cons of Firebase vs MongoDB for a personal portfolio project, and how Firebase's free tier makes it perfect for students.

item.title: My Journey into Software Development
item.description: From healthcare to tech - how I transitioned into software development and what I've learned along the way as a student at Georgia Gwinnett College.

item.title: ITEC 3150 - Advanced Programming
item.description: Advanced Java projects covering design patterns, multithreading, and database integration. A deep dive into enterprise-level programming concepts.

item.title: ITEC 2150 - Intermediate Programming
item.description: A collection of Java projects demonstrating object-oriented programming, data structures, and software engineering principles built during my coursework.
